title: Tesla FSD 14.3.2 | NYC to LA Cannonball Run Zero Interventions 2026
subtitle: 2,833 miles. 49 hours 55 minutes. Zero human interventions. A new benchmark for autonomous driving.
thumbnail_alt: Car dashboard displaying autonomous driving interface
content_html:
Tesla FSD version 14.3.2 completed the 2,833-mile NYC to LA Cannonball Run in 49 hours 55 minutes with zero human interventions, beating the prior record by 8.5 hours.

The Run in Numbers

The BLKMDL3 team drove a Tesla Model 3 from the Red Ball Garage in Manhattan to the Portofino Hotel in Redondo Beach without a single driver override or disengagement. The car handled highway merges, overnight driving, and autonomous Supercharger stops.

State of Self-Driving in 2026

The run does not mean FSD is fully autonomous. Tesla classifies it as SAE Level 2 supervised autonomy. A licensed driver was in the seat and legally responsible. But the zero-intervention result is a meaningful engineering milestone.
